content: contributor_service.get_all_with_usage returns (artist, song_count, album_count). UI components must expect 3-tuples.

description: Over-refactoring MetadataService.py led to stealth-deletion of VFS safety checks and critical docstrings.
resolution: Enforce surgical edits for refactorings. Do not prune documentation or whitespace in files containing sensitive logic like VFS or multi-frame mappings.

content: Unified id3_frames.json is the source of truth for all tags. Categories are defined by presence of icon and absence of field. id3_frame property acts as fallback for category frame resolution.
Removed TKEY=true legacy hack. Status is now managed solely by TagRepository and the STATUS TXXX frame.

MetadataService.write_tags uses a fallback for 4-character uppercase frame IDs (written as TXXX descriptors) if a native Mutagen class is missing. This ensures dynamic tags stay portable even if not explicitly mapped.
